parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "finest level" as finest
participant "intermediate level(s)" as intermediate
participant "base level" as base

note over finest: U(k,2) -> F(U(k,2))
finest -> finest: SDC
note over finest: U(k',2) -> F(U(k',2))
finest -> intermediate: restrict
note over intermediate: U(k,1) -> F(U(k,1))
intermediate -> intermediate: FAS
note over intermediate: tau = Q(1)*F(U(k,1)) - R*Q(2)*F(U(k',2))
intermediate -> intermediate: SDC with FAS
note over intermediate: U(k',1) -> F(U(k',1))
intermediate -> base: restrict
note over base: U(k,0) -> F(U(k,0))
base -> base: FAS
note over base: tau = Q(0)*F(U(k,0)) - R*Q(1)*F(U(k',1))
base -> base: SDC with FAS
note over base: U(k+,0) -> F(U(k+,0))
base -> base: coarse correction
note over base: c(0) = U(k+,0) - R*U(k',1)
base -> intermediate: prolongate
intermediate -> intermediate: correct
note over intermediate: U(k'',1) = U(k',1) + P*c(0)
intermediate -> intermediate: SDC
note over intermediate: U(k+,1) -> F(U(k+,1))
intermediate -> intermediate: coarse correction
note over intermediate: c(1) = U(k+,1) - R*U(k',2)
intermediate -> finest: prolongate
finest -> finest: correct
note over finest: U(k'',2) = U(k',2) + P*c(1)
finest -> finest: SDC
note over finest: U(k+,2) -> F(U(k+,2))

@enduml
```
